title: Subscriptions
subtitle: Review your full subscription inventory and open cleanup only where needed.
batch_review_description_one: Review the current filtered item as a batch.
batch_review_description_other: Review the current {{count}} filtered items as a batch.
detail_reason_hint: Select a feed to see why it might belong in triage.
detail_reason_normal: This subscription still looks healthy and can stay where it is.
detail_reason_stale_and_inactive: This feed has been quiet for a long stretch and no unread backlog is keeping it active.
detail_reason_stale_with_no_stars: This feed has gone quiet and there are no starred articles holding onto it.
detail_reason_inactive_without_signals: There is no unread or starred activity pulling this feed forward.
detail_reason_stale_but_supported: The feed is quiet, but there is still enough signal to review before deleting.
empty: No subscriptions match the current filters.
empty_broken_filter: Broken references are outside the subscription list. Open batch review to inspect them.
detail_empty: Select a subscription to view details.
detail_empty_broken: Broken references are outside the subscription list. Open batch review to inspect them.
